body.title: [awaiting_validation] Absorb 18 palace-era slates (TSV) + missing .TheIgors slates into UU slates/
body.description:
**Problem:** 18 palace-era slates in `~/TheIgorsProject/20260427.Cleanup/database/palace_slates_archived.tsv` are all measured-missing from UU slates/ and carry REAL section summaries (not pointers). Plus ~40 slates in `.TheIgors/claudecode{,.bak}/` to dedup against UU's 78. **Sessions DROPPED from scope (verified 2026-06-28):** the ~350 `~/.TheIgors/claudecode.bak/palace_echo/palace_sessions_*.md` are hollow echo-test stubs ('Test session', 'Echo test', 0 lines) — NOT real sessions; absorbing them would pad the store with exactly the hollow content this decision rejects. UU sessions/=0 is by-design (session_capture.py writes live sessions); leave it.
**Proposed shape:** Parse palace_slates_archived.tsv, reconstruct each of the 18 slates (date, title, section-summary body) into UU slates/, preserving original date. Dedup the ~40 .TheIgors slates by date; absorb only the genuinely-missing ones. CRITICAL: stamp each emitted node with the ORIGINAL date via `memory_emit.stamp_for_day_only(record_id, yyyymmdd)` (NOT now_stamp) so `emitted_at` is historical — otherwise /context-load Step 2a/3 floods with today-stamped 2026-04 items.
**Affected files:** writes to devlab/runtime/memory/slates/; reads palace_slates_archived.tsv, ~/.TheIgors/claudecode{,.bak}/. No code changes.
**Design rules:** one-home canonical store; memory_emit/slate_store as write path; stamp_for_day_only for historical emitted_at; NO SQLITE (TSV/.md -> flat); dedup-before-write ([[feedback_delete_after_successful_merge]]); CP1 (do not absorb the hollow palace_echo stubs).
**Scope boundary:** IN — the 18 TSV slates + missing-after-dedup .TheIgors slates. OUT — sessions (hollow, dropped); decisions/tickets (separate/already-absorbed).
**Test plan:** (1) The 18 TSV slates each have a corresponding UU slates/ entry with non-empty section summary and a HISTORICAL emitted_at (not today). (2) Re-run date-based dedup: 0 missing in-scope slates. (3) Spot-check 3 reconstructed slates against their TSV rows. (4) /context-load 'recent decisions/slates' still surfaces genuinely-recent items, not the freshly-absorbed historical ones.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Reconstructed 18 palace-era slates (2026-04-02..04-20) from TSV into UU slates/ (summary-level, provenance-marked). 42 .TheIgors slates already in UU -> skipped (UU canonical, gaps-only fill). Slate count 69->87. Sessions confirmed-hollow, dropped. Verify: 0 in-scope slates missing; fidelity spot-check passes; slates are date-keyed .txt so emitted_at flooding N/A. Proof = re-runnable migrate_slates.py dedup; proof_emitter can't bind a data-absorb (missing lever = migration/absorb proof mode).
